video_job.actor_prompt: Japanese fantasy RPG guild training yard with warm wood architecture, Kiri Ashbell, a masculine frontline adventurer in a reinforced leather armor and tattered guild cloak, catches Kiri Emberlane, a feminine scout in a cropped travel jacket and messenger straps, by the forearm after she stumbles during a training drill, safe supportive motion, lively guild atmosphere, no injury, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous training yard shot, Kiri Emberlane regains her balance and laughs softly while Kiri Ashbell releases his supportive forearm hold, cooperative recovery, friendly interaction between colleagues, no injury, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The interaction depicts a safe, non-sexual, professional physical support scenario between two guild members during a training exercise. There is no violence, injury, or inappropriate content.

timeline_story.story_verb: helped recover balance after a drill with
timeline_story.selection_reason: Collaborating to stabilize the injured novice after a training drill accident in the yard.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Collaborated on a successful rescue mission.
